name: Chromacell
short_description: In this sideways scrolling shmup, take control of your spaceship and navigate through vibrant pixelated environments filled with hordes of enemy spacecraft. Upgrade your ship and weapons, dodge enemy fire while blasting through each stage. Emerge victorious as the ultimate space pilot!
detailed_description:
Chromacell is a horizontal scrolling retro style 2D shoot 'em up with colourful pixel-art graphics.

Select one of four difficulty modes and take on the enemy hoards!

Features


Engage enemies on land and in the air

10 uniquely themed stages to conquer

'No bullet mode' for beginners

Power-up your weapons and thrusters

Play with keyboard or gamepad

Survive dangerous boss battles

Find secrets for extra points

Local and Steam Cloud saves
